context: Evaluates whether the agent uses incremental set rules (`violations contains msg if`) rather than comprehensions assigned to a top-level variable, and uses a boolean `allow` rule (not `allow := true`).

checklist.name: Incremental violations set using `contains`
checklist.description: Violations are collected with `violations contains msg if { ... }` — not with a comprehension `violations := {msg | ...}` assigned to a variable

checklist.name: Boolean allow rule referencing violations
checklist.description: `allow` is a boolean rule (`allow if count(violations) == 0`) — not assigned as `allow := true`

checklist.name: Checks for privileged and missing limits
checklist.description: Separate violation rules for privileged containers and containers missing resource limits

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
